CustomField.description: Target SObject API name (e.g., Contact, Account). Required for EXACT_FIELD match type. Optional for REGEX_PATTERN (leave blank to apply regex across all objects).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Required for EXACT_FIELD. Enter SObject API name (e.g., Contact, Account, MyObject__c). Optional for REGEX_PATTERN - leave blank to apply across all objects.
CustomField.label: SObject Type
